body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Grafton 9 Election Results**
**For Immediate Release: **September 5, 2017
**Contact: **Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
**Concord **– Statement from NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester on Grafton 9 Election Results:

“Tonight, the voters of Grafton County District 09 reaffirmed their support for Governor Sununu’s pro-jobs, pro-economy agenda that has delivered jobs and economic growth for New Hampshire. By electing Vincent Paul Migliore to the position of State Representative, Grafton 9 has put their trust in a dedicated member of the community and former business owner. The Republican Party looks forward to welcoming Representative-Elect Migliore to Concord so he can get to work for the people of his district.”

###

subject: Tell Congress to Stand up for Dreamers
body:
Tell Congress: Stand up for Dreamers (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems)

The petition to Congress reads:
“Pass clean legislation to reinstate the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program with no strings attached and block all right-wing attempts to use DACA as a bargaining chip to insert legislative poison pills to expand immigration enforcement, wall off our borders, or ramp-up attacks on other immigrants and refugees.”

Add your name:

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems)

Dear Activist,

(https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems)

The white supremacist in chief just struck again. Donald Trump killed the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program and put more than 800,000 immigrants at risk of deportation.1

DACA gave immigrants who came to the United States as children, known as Dreamers, the ability to obtain driver’s licenses and work permits and live safely in the only country many of them have ever known. President Obama created DACA after thousands of undocumented young people took the risk to come out of the shadows and fight for protected status.

Trump knows that ending DACA is cruel and unpopular. He was too cowardly to make the announcement himself and has now put Dreamers’ fate in Congress’ hands. Republicans in Congress have had a bigoted, anti-immigrant agenda for years. And Trump premised his entire administration on a racist war on immigrants. Now, Trump and his racist party want to use Dreamers as a bargaining chip to advance their hateful agenda and put other immigrants at risk. Now more than ever, we must stand with our allies in the immigrant rights movement and make our demands crystal clear: No trade-offs. No compromises.

Democrats and Republicans of good conscience must pass clean legislation to reinstate DACA with no strings attached. They must also stop right-wing extremists from using Dreamers as a bargaining chip and inserting legislative poison pills to expand immigration enforcement, build Trump’s wall or shut down our borders. Can you add your name?

Tell Congress: Immediately restore and expand DACA by passing clean legislation without any poison pills from the extreme right wing. Click here to sign the petition. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems)

When Trump set his anti-immigrant agenda in motion, he said that Immigration and Customs Enforcement would focus on removing dangerous criminals from the country and told DACA beneficiaries that they could “rest easy.” Trump was lying. His rogue deportation force has targeted and attacked all immigrants since day one of his racist regime. Going after Dreamers is just another way to advance his white supremacist agenda and terrorize immigrant communities.

Racist, anti-immigrant attorneys general from 10 states threatened to sue the Department of Justice if it did not end DACA by Sept. 5.2 Their threats gave Trump license to kill the program. Trump says he admires Dreamers, but he is a coward and a liar. His attempt to shift the burden to Congress and give them six months to act is nothing more than a desperate attempt to appear compassionate and use Dreamers as political cover to advance his reckless and dangerous anti-immigrant agenda. Trump is now planning to phase out DACA, saying that current DACA beneficiaries will not be impacted until March 2018. But we cannot trust him to keep his word. To protect Dreamers, Congress must take bold action immediately.

Democrats and Republicans have already introduced the 2017 DREAM Act and The American Hope Act, sister bills that would restore and expand DACA. 3 If Congress passes the 2017 DREAM Act as-is, with no amendments, it would:

Immediately protect current Dreamers from deportation. Raise the program’s age entry requirement to 18. Immigrants who entered the country before the age of 18 would qualify for DACA under the new law. Expand eligibility for DACA to include college students, members of the military, workers and full-time caregivers of minor children. Add new paths to citizenship for Dreamers.
Dreamers embody the spirit of the United States in a way that small minded xenophobic Republicans like Trump will never understand. They came to the United States with parents who made the courageous and extremely difficult decision to leave their families, communities and countries of birth behind in the hopes of building better lives. Some families are displaced by war, others by climate change or corporate greed. All are seeking refuge, freedom from persecution and better economic opportunities for their families. There is nothing more American than that. Trump’s attacks on immigrants are attacks on the very fabric of our nation. We must push Congress to act now.

Tell Congress: Immediately restore and expand DACA by passing clean legislation without any poison pills from the extreme right wing. Click here to sign the petition. (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems)

Government funding is set to expire at the end of September, and Trump has threatened to shut down the government if Congress does not approve funding for his southern border wall in a broader must-pass government funding bill.4 Our activism pushed Senate Democrats to block funding for Trump’s wall before. Together, we can do it again. That is why CREDO is teaming up with our friends at United We Dream to make sure Democrats and Republicans of good conscience advance strong legislation to reinstate and expand DACA and stop anti-immigrant Republicans from leveraging the program to ramp-up immigration enforcement or wall off our borders.

Restoring DACA will not protect all immigrants from Trump’s hate, but it would bring us one step closer to reaching that goal. Can you help us make sure Congress takes a stand for Dreamers and does not use them as bargaining chips?

Tell Congress: Immediately restore and expand DACA by passing clean legislation without any poison pills from the extreme right wing. Click the link below to sign the petition.

https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems (https://act.credoaction.com/sign/trump_daca_dems)

Thank you for your activism,

Nicole Regalado, Campaign Manager
CREDO Action from Working Assets (http://www.credoaction.com)

President Trump Approves Emergency Declarations for those in the Path of Hurricane Irma

Yesterday, President Trump approved an emergency declaration in the State of
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eed1ca5805f7b7f04fdcdba9f3d5148ecbf950f41d89324654e2eeff4b45761f9db6dc49a0ed27cb6d4dac2bc438082dfc3136a910d36f94
Florida , the territory of the

U.S. Virgin Islands , and the Commonwealth of
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eed1ca5805f7b7f0163ae93ee45a4be8edbff1f03453eae122e9826a632f3d198eb238c344ce18671c8ee93a73eaaa45a64c664a60d33bad
Puerto Rico . The President ordered Federal assistance to supplement the response efforts due to the emergency conditions resulting from Hurricane Irma beginning on September 5, 2017, and continuing.

Tax Reform

Today, the President is traveling to Bismarck, North Dakota, to participate in a tax reform event with workers from the energy sector. President Trump is committed to unleashing America’s economic potential and his plan for tax reform will revitalize the American economy and create millions of jobs.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eed1ca5805f7b7f0d73a09e8bdfcd65771071bc65a9fe19103cff9d99487c5a13caa84a30696e10e798f6ac7407efd60ad1415af4ccaa9bb
Watch the event live

Yesterday, Vice President Pence participated in a swearing-in ceremony for U.S. Surgeon General Dr. Jerome Adams.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=eed1ca5805f7b7f033236eacf04aac16de45314836bff42c5da8c3a7fa366f3a3c8639d0f41fc5650ba0091220ee6234267fab1dfcffd8b1
Watch the ceremony

Photo of the Day

Vice President Mike Pence swears-in Dr. Jerome Adams as U.S. Surgeon General | September 6, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS and VP Today

Today, the President and Vice President will meet with House and Senate leaders from both parties at the White House. In the afternoon, the President will travel to Bismarck, North Dakota, where he will participate in a tax reform event. The Vice President will then travel to the U.S. Capitol to participate in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch. Later in the day, the Vice President will join Director of the National Security Agency (NSA) Michael Rogers to tour the agency and participate in a series of briefings.

Coming Up This Week

The Amir of Kuwait will visit the White House tomorrow to meet with the President and Vice President.

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Protecting DREAMers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Yesterday, we got the official news that Donald Trump has decided to end the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program, which protects 800,000 young, undocumented immigrants from deportation.
Immigration enforcement should focus on people who are criminals and threats to public safety, not young people who have no significant connections to the countries of their births, and whose energy, hard work and innovation are vital components of our economic future.
Trump's decision to go back on his word to protect these DREAMers is harmful and wrong, but we still have time to do something about it.
I strongly support the bipartisan DREAM Act and previously joined my colleagues in urging President Trump to protect these young people who have great potential to continue contributing to our society and economy.
**But this isn't enough. I need you to make your voice heard too. [Will you put your name down on my petition urging Senate Republicans to allow a vote on the DREAM Act, a bill that would protect 800,000 young people from deportation?](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde0e/2a380d31/1f24953d/fe7a65/1543293627/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170906_DACA_nh?source=e20170906_DACA_nh&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
The President's decision isn't just heartless -- it will also tear apart families and hurt our economy.
I'm fighting to protect our hard-working young people, and I hope that you will join me.
With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde0e/2a380d31/1f24953d/fe7a66/1543293627/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Did you see what President Obama said yesterday about the Trump administration's decision to end DACA, the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program, and put 800,000 young immigrants at risk of deportation?
---
**[](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d82f/2b07114c/1bbc58ea/73136a0f/1157238545/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-dreamers?source=PT-20170906-MustRead_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")**
Team,

Did you see what President Obama said about the Trump administration's decision to end DACA, the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program, and put 800,000 young immigrants at risk of deportation? He said:

_" This is about young people who grew up in America -- kids who study in our schools, young adults who are starting careers, patriots who pledge allegiance to our flag. These Dreamers are Americans in their hearts, in their minds, in every single way but one: on paper...Ultimately, this is about basic decency. This is about whether we are a people who kick hopeful young strivers out of America, or whether we treat them the way we'd want our own kids to be treated. It's about who we are as a people -- and who we want to be."_
**Then he called on all of us to take action, saying, "all of us share an obligation to stand up, speak out, and secure our most cherished values for the next generation."**

[**Answer President Obama 's call: Add your name now to urge Congress to reverse the Trump administration's decision and provide a solution to protect these young DREAMers.**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d82f/2b07114c/1bbc58ea/73136a0f/1157238545/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-dreamers?source=PT-20170906-MustRead_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

This is only the second time President Obama has formally spoken out against Donald Trump's actions -- and he wouldn't do it if it weren't vitally important that we fight back.

This is a question of who we are as Americans and whether we will stand up for the values that make our country great.

**Add your name now: call on Congress to take action and protect DREAMers from being deported from the only country they 've ever called home:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/protect-DREAMers**](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d82f/2b07114c/1bbc58ea/73136a0f/1157238545/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVkdTVkpUVkU1QlRVVWxKUT09IjoiIn0=/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/protect-dreamers?source=PT-20170906-MustRead_DS-ProsHV&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=")

Team DSCC

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. body:

subject: ❗ Republicans trying to recall our women
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c67c4/24c69fd9/a2468cf1/189b34ae/3126457720/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE908N_digital_email_20170906_NevadaRecall_inact&source=WQEFE908N_digital_email_20170906_NevadaRecall_inact")
---

Peter,

"If you can't win, steal."

That's the new playbook of the Nevada Republican Party. They're trying to recall women state senators who won their seats fair and square and who are serving Nevadans well.

Two of the targets are Nicole Cannizzaro and Joyce Woodhouse, women our EMILY's List community fought hard to elect last year.

**[We won't let the GOP get away with this. Donate $3 to help fight this recall effort and support state and local EMILY's List women like Nicole and Joyce across the country.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c67c4/24c69fd9/a2468cf1/189b34af/3126457720/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170906_email_NevadaRecall?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+We+wont+let+the+GOP+get+away+with+this+D&utm_campaign=WQEFE908N_digital_email_20170906_NevadaRecall_inact&source=WQEFE908N_digital_email_20170906_NevadaRecall_inact")**

The Nevada GOP is doing all of this without giving any actual reason for why they want to recall our women.

But it's not hard to guess: Nevada Democrats hold the majority in the Senate by just two votes. The Republicans are desperate to get their hands on the majority, even if it means disregarding the rightful will of the voters.

We've seen just how low state Republicans will stoop to subvert democracy -- from passing restrictive voter ID laws to drawing heavily gerrymandered districts to eliminating early voting hours, all to suppress Democratic votes. The Nevada GOP is already playing dirty, so we have to help Nicole and Joyce prepare for anything.

**Donate $3 to help keep Nicole and Joyce in office and support our state and local women nationwide:**

Thanks,

Lucinda Guinn

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Another cruel decision [Take Action]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
It's up to all of us to tell Congress to pass the DREAM Act without delay.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTE4NjI1MTkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDUxMDgxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0) | **Take Action:
Tell Congress to pass the DREAM Act today** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MTE4NjI1MTkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDUxMDgxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Dear Friend -- America is at its best when we give our people the opportunity to pursue a brighter future.
President Trump's decision to rescind the DACA (Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals) program is cruel. And we cannot let it stand. More than 17,000 Dreamers call Washington state home. This decision threatens the ability of these young men and women -- many of whom know no other place to call home -- to pursue that better future at the heart of the American dream.
We're going to do everything in our power here in Washington state to keep these young people home -- starting with Attorney General Bob Ferguson taking Donald Trump to court over this illegal and immoral action.
But this also must be a moment of national action. Passing the bipartisan DREAM Act would provide permanent protection for young people across the country.
[**Our voices must be heard: Add your name today and call on Congress to pass the DREAM Act without delay.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTE4NjI1MTkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTI0MDUxMDgxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
The example of what we did in Washington state should be a model for the nation. Dreamers sat down with Democrats and Republicans in our state legislature, told their stories, and talked about why they love calling Washington state home. After listening to these stories, Republicans joined with Democrats to pass a state version of the DREAM Act. Now, our national Congress must join us, seizing this urgent challenge to stand up for Dreamers.
To the Dreamers in Washington state, know this: We will consider every option possible to challenge the repeal of DACA. We stand with you. And we're going to keep fighting with you.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

After listening to these stories, Republicans joined with Democrats to pass a state version of the DREAM Act. Now, our national Congress must join us, seizing this urgent challenge to stand up for Dreamers. To the Dreamers in Washington state, know this: We will consider every option possible to challenge the repeal of DACA. We stand with you. And we're going to keep fighting with you. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee

subject: NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Announces R.E.D. Town Hall Series
body:
**NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester Announces R.E.D. Town Hall Series**
**For Immediate Release: **September 6, 2017
**Contact: **Patrick Hynes, 202-321-5310
**Concord **– NH GOP Chair Jeanie Forrester released the following statement announcing the first R.E.D. Town Hall in Lancaster on September 14:

"The New Hampshire Republican State Committee, in partnership with the Coös County Republican Committee, is proud to announce the first of our R.E.D. Town Hall Series, to be held in Lancaster, New Hampshire. New Hampshire Republicans are eager to engage all voters, and are proud to promote the Republican agenda, sharing what we have accomplished, and how we're moving New Hampshire forward. Rural voters are a vital voice in our Granite State and we are excited to hear what's on their minds.”

“Senate President Chuck Morse will be the main speaker at the event, held at the Lancaster Town Hall. September 14th Town Hall meeting at 7 p.m., Lancaster Town Hall, 25 Main Street, Lancaster New Hampshire.”

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: time for Senate action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __ The Trump administration's decision to end the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) program puts the lives of 800,000 young people (known as DREAMers) into limbo and worse.

These individuals came to our country as infants and young children when they were too young to have a say. They have done nothing wrong. In communities across America, they are attending school, holding productive jobs and contributing to our country and our economy.

[**As the New York Times said this morning: "DACA is morally right, legally sound and fiscally smart policy". I agree. That's why I hope you will join me in demanding an immediate vote in the Senate to take action to save DACA >> **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bd4/70cdc2ba/469e4a4a/397dd5f/1614553486/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/defend-dreamers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+As+the+New+York+Times+said+this+morning+&utm_campaign=em090617&source=em090617")

It's clear that disrupting the lives of DREAMers is not only against American values; it's a disaster for our economy. If DACA recipients were to lose their work permits and jobs, it would cost the U.S. economy over $400 billion over 10 years -- $400 million over one year in Maryland alone.

We all want safe and secure borders, but deporting Dreamers is not the way to achieve that goal.

[**10,000 Maryland DREAMers know only one home --the United States of America. It's time we fight like hell for them and demand that Mitch McConnell immediately bring the bi-partisan Dreamers Bill up for a vote in the Senate. Are you with me?**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bd4/70cdc2ba/469e4a4a/397dd5c/1614553486/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/defend-dreamers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+10000+Maryland+DREAMers+know+only+one+ho&utm_campaign=em090617&source=em090617")

Thank you for all you do,

Chris Van Hollen
U.S. Senator

name: DWS
subject: Preparing for Hurricane Irma
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Friend, Hurricane Irma is expected to reach South Florida this weekend.

As it stands, **Hurricane Irma is a Category 5 storm system and is the strongest hurricane outside of the Caribbean to ever be recorded.**

Being prepared is incredibly important to keep yourself, your family, and friends safe. Here are some things you can do to start:
* Put together a supply kit that includes a flashlight, first aid supplies, batteries, any necessary medication, and cash in case you need to evacuate.
* Stock up on a week's worth of bottled water and foodstuffs per family member.
* Make sure your electronics are fully charged (cell phone, radio, etc.)
* Stay up to date with weather alerts and evacuation orders by local officials.
* Consider other items and needs if your household includes pets or seniors that will need special care.
* You can make your own plan here at [_**floridadisaster.org/info**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e3b/622b7b5b/5dc6155/307bd942/2117931664/VEsH/ "http://floridadisaster.org/info/").

You can get weather updates from FEMA on both their [_**English**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e3b/622b7b5b/5dc6155/307bd945/2117931664/VEsE/ "https://twitter.com/fema") and [_**Spanish**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e3b/622b7b5b/5dc6155/307bd944/2117931664/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/FEMAespanol") Twitter accounts.

In addition, you can check out [_**Ready.gov/hurricanes**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e3b/622b7b5b/5dc6155/307bd947/2117931664/VEsC/ "https://www.ready.gov/hurricanes") or [_**The National Hurricane Center**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113e3b/622b7b5b/5dc6155/307bd946/2117931664/VEsD/ "http://www.nhc.noaa.gov/prepare/ready.php") for other tips and alerts.

Stay safe, everyone.

Debbie |
